title: Murdered Harkerville man identified
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The 67-year-old man who was found murdered on a smallholding in Harkerville on the N2 between Plettenberg Bay and Knysna has been identified as Rodney Renwick.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The 67-year-old man who was found murdered on a smallholding in Harkerville on the N2 between Plettenberg Bay and Knysna has been identified as Rodney Renwick."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"His body was found on Hault Hill Farm along the N2, about 10km from town, by security personnel at about 15:45 on Wednesday 10 September, and they summoned the police to the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His hands were tied up and he had suffered multiple injuries to his body and head.","html":"His hands were tied up and he had suffered multiple injuries to his body and head."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The security personnel had been looking for him after his Mercedes-Benz was abandoned by two people in Sedgefield earlier that same day.","html":"The security personnel had been looking for him after his Mercedes-Benz was abandoned by two people in Sedgefield earlier that same day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Renwick was a well-known character in Plettenberg Bay, and was involved in the solar energy field. He was always seen riding around in his Mercedes-Benz with his dog, Rocky.","html":"Renwick was a well-known character in Plettenberg Bay, and was involved in the solar energy field. He was always seen riding around in his Mercedes-Benz with his dog, Rocky."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Preliminary investigations led the police to arrest two suspects, a man and woman aged 28 and 34.","html":"Preliminary investigations led the police to arrest two suspects, a man and woman aged 28 and 34."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Plettenberg Bay Police have opened a murder docket and the suspects are facing charges of murder and theft of a motor vehicle.","html":"The Plettenberg Bay Police have opened a murder docket and the suspects are facing charges of murder and theft of a motor vehicle."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"They were scheduled to appear in court on Monday 22 September to apply for bail, which the police opposed. They remain in custody."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A private remembrance service for Renwick was held in Plettenberg Bay last week, confirmed Donovan Tait, a friend.","html":"A private remembrance service for Renwick was held in Plettenberg Bay last week, confirmed Donovan Tait, a friend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous article:","html":"Previous article:"},{"type":"list","items":["Elderly man murdered in Harkerville"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
